# Hiring Hand

> Hiring Hand is an AI video hiring agent. It conducts structured, EEOC-compliant first-round interviews with every applicant — video-first, in 47 languages — and delivers a scored candidate card with summary, strengths, concerns, and a scrubbable transcript to a recruiter dashboard. Built by Voxaris LLC.

## What it does

- Replaces first-round phone/video screens for high-volume hourly and structured-skill roles
- Covers hospitality, healthcare support (CNA/HHA), light industrial, warehouse, retail, and dispatch
- Runs 24/7 — applicants get a callback within 60 seconds of submitting
- Uses Tavus (conversational video), tavus-harmony-3 LLM, Cartesia TTS, Deepgram STT, Raven-1 perception
- EEOC compliant; built to satisfy BIPA, IL AIVIA, NYC AEDT, FL SB 482

## Who it's for

- Staffing agencies running hospitality / industrial / healthcare-support placements
- Mid-market employers with high churn front-line workforces
- Enterprise talent-acquisition teams that want to recover the ~60% of recruiter time spent on first-round screens

## Key pages

- [Home](https://hiringhand.io/): product overview, dashboard preview, how-it-works, FAQ, demo CTA
- [Try it live (sandbox)](https://hiringhand.io/talk): take the candidate-side experience
- [Privacy Policy](https://hiringhand.io/privacy): how candidate and client data is handled
- [Biometric Policy](https://hiringhand.io/biometric-policy): BIPA / IL AIVIA conformance
- [Compliance](https://hiringhand.io/compliance): EEOC, NYC AEDT, FL SB 482, EU AI Act stance

## Operational facts

- Average time to scored shortlist: 14 minutes
- Default data retention: 90 days, configurable per client contract
- ATS integration: webhook (Greenhouse, Lever, BambooHR, ICIMS, custom) or candidate-side iframe embed
- Languages: 47, candidate selects at session start; transcripts stored in original + English translation
- Pricing: per-interview, per-role, or unlimited monthly tier; sized to replace 1–3 full-time recruiters

## Compliance posture

- AI disclosure delivered as Jordan's first non-skippable turn in every session
- Affirmative consent required before interview proceeds
- No automated hiring decision — human recruiter reviews every output
- No biometric identifiers (face/voice prints suitable for out-of-session identification) generated
- Interview content not used to train general-purpose AI models
- Not sold to third parties

## Operator

Voxaris LLC, Orlando + Nashville. Contact: hello@hiringhand.io.

## Sister products

- voxaris.io (parent brand)
- Voxaris AEO Outreach (AI search visibility)
- Voxaris Audit (GEO/AEO audits)
